nodes.name: account.js
nodes.summary: Shared account-domain helpers: string cleaning, bearer-token user resolution via Supabase, and normalization of order items and favorite-product payloads against the product catalog.

nodes.name: requireUser
nodes.summary: Extracts a bearer token from the request, resolves it to a Supabase user, and returns either the authenticated user or a 401 JSON response.

nodes.name: groupByOrderId
nodes.summary: Groups a flat list of rows into a Map keyed by order_id.

nodes.name: resolveOrderItem
nodes.summary: Enriches a raw order line item with current catalog product data (name, brand, image, URL) resolved by slug or name.

nodes.name: normalizeFavoritePayload
nodes.summary: Validates and normalizes a client-submitted favorite-product payload into a canonical shape backed by catalog data, returning null if the product cannot be resolved.

nodes.name: coupon-admin.js
nodes.summary: Admin-facing coupon helpers: usage-stat aggregation, enrichment of coupon rows for the admin UI, and validation/normalization of coupon patch payloads from the admin panel.

nodes.name: fetchCouponUsageStats
nodes.summary: Computes total and active redemption counts for a coupon code from the redemptions table.

nodes.name: enrichCouponForAdmin
nodes.summary: Combines the customer-facing coupon presentation with usage statistics for the admin coupon list view.

nodes.name: buildCouponPatchPayload
nodes.summary: Validates and builds the DB update payload for an admin coupon edit, enforcing type, value, and eligibility metadata constraints and collecting validation errors.

nodes.name: coupons.js
nodes.summary: Core coupon engine: normalizes coupon codes/money, evaluates full eligibility (dates, tiers, exclusions, birthday/first-order/loyalty rules), and computes discounts server-side for checkout and account surfaces.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains a single large 300+ line eligibility-evaluation function (validateCouponEligibility) implementing many business rules; heavy use of small pure normalization helpers composed together.

nodes.name: normalizeCouponCode
nodes.summary: Normalizes a coupon code string to uppercase, trimmed form.

nodes.name: isBirthdayCouponEligible
nodes.summary: Determines whether the current date falls within the eligible window around a customer's stored birthday.

nodes.name: findOrders
nodes.summary: Fetches a user's or guest's past orders from Supabase for use in coupon eligibility checks (e.g. first-order or repeat-use rules).

nodes.name: findRedemptions
nodes.summary: Fetches prior redemption records for a coupon code scoped to a user or guest email, used to enforce per-customer usage limits.

nodes.name: findReservations
nodes.summary: Fetches active coupon reservations (in-progress checkout holds) scoped to a user or guest email.

nodes.name: discountFor
nodes.summary: Computes the monetary discount for a coupon (percent, fixed, or free-shipping) against an eligible subtotal, applying max-discount caps.

nodes.name: hasTrustedSmartRoutineCompletion
nodes.summary: Checks whether a user has a trusted completed smart-routine record, gating routine-completion coupons.

nodes.name: resolveEligibilitySpec
nodes.summary: Derives the concrete eligibility rule spec (allowed tiers, required flags) for a coupon code from its DB row and code-specific defaults.

nodes.name: validateCouponEligibility
nodes.summary: Main server-side coupon validation entry point: checks activation window, exclusions, redemption limits, membership tier, birthday/first-order/routine conditions, and returns a pass/fail eligibility result with discount amount and customer-facing messaging.

nodes.name: publicCouponRow
nodes.summary: Shapes an internal coupon validation result into the public response object returned to the client.

nodes.name: normalizeExclusionList
nodes.summary: Normalizes a raw excluded-product/category list (array or comma-separated string) into a deduplicated, lowercased array.

nodes.name: detectDiscountFieldConflicts
nodes.summary: Flags inconsistencies between a coupon's type field and its populated discount value fields, for admin-facing data integrity warnings.

nodes.name: resolveCouponPresentation
nodes.summary: Builds the full customer/admin-facing presentation object for a coupon row, combining envelope data, eligibility spec, and exclusion lists.

nodes.name: sanitizeEligibilityMetadataPatch
nodes.summary: Sanitizes an admin-submitted eligibility metadata patch, merging it with existing metadata and validating allowed tier codes.

nodes.name: loyalty-config.js
nodes.summary: Canonical loyalty tier configuration (Essential/Signature/Elite thresholds and labels) and helpers to normalize tier codes and compute a customer's tier and progress from spend/order count, mirroring the SQL RPC in the loyalty ledger migration.

nodes.name: computeTierFromSpend
nodes.summary: Computes the customer's loyalty tier, progress percentage, and next-tier target from their product-net spend and completed order count, matching the SQL OR-threshold rule.

nodes.name: order-cancellation.js
nodes.summary: Server-side order cancellation domain logic: status sets defining blocking conditions, eligibility evaluation (direct cancel vs. cancel request vs. blocked), and execution of the cancellation including inventory release and coupon redemption cleanup.

nodes.name: OrderCancellationError
nodes.summary: Custom error type carrying an HTTP status and machine-readable code for blocked order cancellation attempts.

nodes.name: assertHardBlocks
nodes.summary: Throws OrderCancellationError if the order is already terminal, shipped, or has an active return, preventing any cancellation path.

nodes.name: resolveCancelMode
nodes.summary: Determines whether an order qualifies for immediate direct cancellation or must go through a cancel-request/review flow, based on order and payment status.

nodes.name: evaluateCancelEligibility
nodes.summary: Top-level eligibility check combining hard blocks and cancel-mode resolution to decide whether and how an order can be cancelled.

nodes.name: releaseCouponRedemptions
nodes.summary: Releases/reverts coupon redemption records tied to a cancelled order.

nodes.name: executeDirectCancel
nodes.summary: Executes an immediate order cancellation: updates order/payment status, releases reserved inventory, and reverts coupon redemptions.

nodes.name: executeCancelRequest
nodes.summary: Records a customer cancel request for review (rather than cancelling immediately) and logs the corresponding customer event.

nodes.name: loadOwnedOrderBundle
nodes.summary: Loads an order together with its shipments and return requests, scoped and verified to belong to the requesting user, for use in cancellation eligibility checks.

nodes.name: response.js
nodes.summary: Tiny shared HTTP response helpers used across Cloudflare Pages Functions: JSON response builder with no-store cache headers, header helper, and redirect helper.

nodes.name: return-attachments.js
nodes.summary: Shared helper that generates short-lived signed URLs for return-request attachment previews/downloads, enforcing that callers only pass rows already scoped to an authorized reader (customer's own return or admin).
nodes.languageNotes: Contract documented in a large comment block: never accepts client-supplied file paths directly, only DB rows pre-scoped by the caller.

nodes.name: signOneAttachment
nodes.summary: Generates a signed storage URL and preview metadata for a single return-attachment row, swallowing signing errors into a generic error code.

nodes.name: signReturnAttachments
nodes.summary: Batch-signs a list of return-attachment rows into downloadable/previewable URLs; the module's sole public export.

nodes.name: supabase.js
nodes.summary: Low-level Supabase REST/Auth client wrapper used by all API functions: service-role headers, request timeouts, response parsing, and CRUD/RPC/storage helpers (select, insert, update, delete, upsert, rpc, signed URLs).

nodes.name: getUserFromAccessToken
nodes.summary: Resolves a Supabase auth access token to the corresponding user record via the Supabase Auth API.

nodes.name: updateRowsWhere
nodes.summary: Updates rows in a Supabase table matching arbitrary filter parameters and returns the updated rows.

nodes.name: createSignedStorageUrl
nodes.summary: Requests a time-limited signed URL for a Supabase Storage object using the service-role key, for secure client-side file access.

nodes.name: addresses.js
nodes.summary: Cloudflare Pages Function implementing the /api/account/addresses endpoint: list, create, update, and delete a customer's saved shipping addresses, enforcing a single default address.

nodes.name: normalizeAddress
nodes.summary: Cleans and normalizes a raw address payload's fields into a canonical shape for storage.

nodes.name: onRequestGet
nodes.summary: Handles GET requests, returning the authenticated user's saved addresses.

nodes.name: onRequestPost
nodes.summary: Handles POST requests to create a new address for the authenticated user, validating and normalizing the payload first.

nodes.name: onRequestPatch
nodes.summary: Handles PATCH requests to update an existing address owned by the authenticated user.

nodes.name: onRequestDelete
nodes.summary: Handles DELETE requests to remove an address owned by the authenticated user.

nodes.name: coupons.js
nodes.summary: Cloudflare Pages Function implementing GET /api/account/coupons, listing the authenticated customer's saved/redeemed coupons with live eligibility presentation.

nodes.name: onRequestGet
nodes.summary: Fetches the user's coupon redemption history and enriches each with current presentation and eligibility data before returning it.
